name: Bulgarian Ministry of Innovation and Growth - PCIE
Bulgarian Ministry of Innovation and Growth - RIDST
notes: Research, Innovation and Digitalisation for Smart Transformation 2021-2027.

name: Bulgarian Patent Office
method: Official Bulgarian Patent Office SME Fund information page
notes: Local Bulgarian information source for EUIPO SME Fund intellectual-property vouchers.

name: Burgas Municipality
method: Official municipal business measures and news pages
notes: Tracks local Burgas startup, youth innovation, and SME-support measures.

name: EU Funding & Tenders Portal
method: Structured portal search endpoint and official portal pages
notes: Use official portal APIs or public search pages where available. Avoid high-rate scraping.

name: EU Funds Bulgaria
method: Official news, programme pages, and indicative work-programme PDFs
notes: Cross-checks Bulgarian EU fund programme announcements and regional information-centre updates.

name: EUIPO SME Fund
notes: Tracks SME Fund voucher availability and 2026 application window.

name: Eureka / Eurostars
method: Official call pages and national funding information
notes: Tracks Eurostars collaborative R&D calls and country-specific funding rules.

name: Euro-Programs.com
method: Open catalogue and secondary discovery source
notes: Useful for discovering Bulgarian business grant routes, especially rural/local measures. Verify deadlines and final rules against official MIG, DFZ, EUMIS, or eufunds pages.

name: European Innovation Council
notes: Tracks EIC Accelerator, STEP Scale Up, Pathfinder, Transition, and Pre-Accelerator calls.

name: European Institute of Innovation and Technology
notes: Tracks EIT Community startup, accelerator, and innovation opportunities.

name: ISUN / EUMIS Bulgaria
notes: Public platform for EU-funds-related procedures in Bulgaria.

name: Sofia Municipal Guarantee Fund for SMEs
notes: Tracks FISP and other guarantee schemes for innovative and startup SMEs in Sofia.

name: Sofia Municipality - Social Innovations
notes: Tracks the Sofia municipal social-innovation grant programme.

name: Sofia Programme Europe
method: Sofia Municipal Council programme announcements and programme site
notes: Tracks Sofia local civic, green, participation, tourism, and community grant priorities.

name: State Fund Agriculture - SPRZSR admissions
method: Official DFZ call pages and SEU application pages
notes: Tracks Strategic Plan for Agriculture and Rural Areas calls, including rural non-agricultural investment measures.
